fields.summary: Extracting normalize_image_bytes helper for image_to_base64 in types.py

content:
type: STATUS
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
summary: Added module-level normalize_image_bytes(image: bytes) -> tuple[encoded, decoded_for_guessing] above MessageRole; image_to_base64 now does 'self.image, decoded_for_guessing = normalize_image_bytes(self.image)' then 'filetype.guess(decoded_for_guessing)' if no mimetype set. My working tree has no get_image_mimetype method (not present here) -- if you're merging, call get_image_mimetype using decoded_for_guessing from normalize_image_bytes rather than self.image, since self.image may already be base64-encoded and would break filetype detection.

fields.summary: Added module-level normalize_image_bytes(image: bytes) -> tuple[encoded, decoded_for_guessing] above MessageRole; image_to_base64 now does 'self.image, decoded_for_guessing = normalize_image_bytes(self.image)' then 'filetype.guess(decoded_for_guessing)' if no mimetype set. My working tree has no get_image_mimetype method (not present here) -- if you're merging, call get_image_mimetype using decoded_for_guessing from normalize_image_bytes rather than self.image, since self.image may already be base64-encoded and would break filetype detection.
